title: ComEd, Metropolitan Mayors Caucus Award 18 Grants to Support Holiday Lighting Events Across Northern Illinois
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today is Halloween, which means the holidays are just around the corner!

title: ComEd Announces $250,000 in Grants to Bring EVs into Driver Education
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Students at five area public high schools will get behind the wheel of an electric vehicles (EV) in driver education class thanks to a $250,000 investment ComEd announced today with Chicago Public Schools (CPS) and educators from across the region.

title: ComEd, Peoples Gas, and North Shore Gas to Collaborate on Gas Meter Reading
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #AdvancedMetering--The Illinois Commerce Commission today approved an innovative collaboration that enables Peoples Gas and North Shore Gas to securely transmit natural gas meter data via ComEd's smart grid communications network, creating new efficiencies and cost savings for gas customers and reducing carbon emissions.

title: New Tool Available to Help Spanish-Speaking ComEd Customers Lower Bills and Energy Use
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--To support Spanish-speaking customers in identifying the bill-assistance and energy-management support they may need, ComEd has made its Smart Assistance Manager (SAM) available in Spanish.

title: ComEd Helps Families and Businesses Identify Energy Vampires Lurking This Halloween
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Energy vampires are real and may be draining electricity from your home or business.

title: ComEd, North Carolina State University Receive Federal Grant to Develop, Demonstrate Extreme Fast Charging for Electric Vehicles
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ComEd, in partnership with North Carolina State University's FREEDM Systems Center, has been awarded a $200,000 federal research and development grant from the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) to help fund a $5 million research project focused on improving the efficiency of, and reducing the cost of, extreme fast charging (XFC) for electric vehicles (EVs).

title: ComEd Community Solar Projects Delivering Monthly Savings to Income-eligible Customers
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #ComEd--ComEd today announced that subscribers to three community solar projects designed for income-eligible customers are now receiving credits that will provide approximately $1,000 a year in savings on their electricity bills for up to three years.

title: Exelon's Diversity, Equity & Inclusion Honor Roll Recognizes Business Partners Advancing Shared DEI Values
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $EXC--As part of its ongoing commitment to diversity, equity and inclusion, Exelon has named 34 companies to its annual DEI Honor Roll.

title: Exelon Announces Leadership Changes as Company Shapes the Future of Energy Delivery and Grid Transformation
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $EXC--Exelon announces leadership changes as company shapes the future of energy delivery and grid transformation.

title: ComEd Delivers Record-High Reliable Service for Customers in First Three Quarters of 2022
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ComEd's investments to improve the reliability and resiliency of the power grid in northern Illinois continue to pay off for customers, as the company in the first three quarters of 2022 delivered the most reliable electric service in its more than century-long history.

title: 9 Top Utilities Stocks, A Great Place To Invest During A Recession
text: Investing in utilities shares can be a great way to limit downside risk and collect a healthy dividend in turbulent times. Here are some of the best utilities to consider investing in right now.

title: ComEd Selects Nonprofits to Administer $1.4 Million in Climate-Friendly Programs to Northern Illinois Residents
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--To help connect northern Illinois families and businesses to climate-friendly programs and related services, ComEd today announced the selection of the nonprofit organizations that will administer nearly $1.4 million in grants through the energy company's new Climate-Friendly Grant Assistance program. Grants in 2022 have been awarded to Community Investment Corporation (CIC), Equiticity and Proviso Leyden Council for Community Action (PLCCA) to either expand and improv

title: Exelon Signs White House Pledge to Support Equitable Workforce Development for Infrastructure Jobs
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $EXC--Signing the White House Talent Pipeline Challenge is the latest effort by Exelon to build on its industry-leading workforce development programs.

title: ComEd Energy Doctors Offer Energy-Saving Tips for Cold Weather in Time for National Energy Efficiency Day
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--As temperatures drop, ComEd's Energy Doctors offer energy-saving tips for cold weather to help families and individuals manage energy use and save money on electric bills – just in time for National Energy Efficiency Day, which is Wednesday, Oct. 5. “ComEd's Energy Doctors are experts committed to helping customers – especially those facing economic hardships – reduce their electricity use and save money,” said Melissa Washington, ComEd's chief customer officer and sen

title: Exelon (EXC) to Gain From Cost Management & $29B Investment
text: Exelon Corporation (EXC) is poised for growth, courtesy of its strong long-term investment plans and a stable cash flow from operations.

title: ComEd Developing Next Generation of STEM Leaders During Hispanic Heritage Month
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--To celebrate Hispanic Heritage Month and help address the underrepresentation of Latinos in science, technology, engineering and math (STEM) fields, ComEd hosted a STEM Labs event in which Latino high school students built their own robots, worked alongside ComEd engineers and explored STEM careers. “ComEd is committed to diversifying the STEM workforce by providing opportunities for students to build their experience and confidence in this space,” said Lewis “Louie” B
